name: Set up Google Shopping

If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article is one part of the required steps to advertise your products through Google Shopping. After completing these steps we recommend moving on to the next steps at the end of the article."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use this service you will need to turn on the feed in Neto and have a merchant account with Google."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have provided the feed URL (from Neto) to Google they will be able to display your products on their website. CSE's will typically poll these URLS daily to update their systems with your latest inventory data."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a data service job"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up your Google Merchant Account"}], "data-id": "SetUpGMA"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "url", "url": "https://youtu.be/apXuW7Qex7k", "embedData": {"height": 315, "width": 560, "photoUrl": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/apXuW7Qex7k/hqdefault.jpg", "videoID": "apXuW7Qex7k", "showRelated": false, "start": 0, "url": "https://youtu.be/apXuW7Qex7k", "embedType": "youtube", "name": "", "frameSrc": "https://www.youtube.com/embed/apXuW7Qex7k?feature=oembed&autoplay=1"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on setting up your Google Merchant Account, visit the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/188493?hl=en&ref_topic=3163841&rd=1", "children": [{"text": "Google Merchant Center Beginners Guide"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up your Google Shopping Feed"}], "data-id": "SetUpGSF"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You may need to prove to Google that you own the website you're uploading from. Once set, click "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping5.05T5g00000gQA6dEAG.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping5.05T5g00000gQA6dEAG.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In another browser tab, open your Neto control panel. "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Google Shopping Data Feed", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Feed URL/Install", frequency,", "bold": true}, {"text": " we highly recommend daily."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set your "}, {"text": "fetch time", "bold": true}, {"text": To force an upload, click on your feed name."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping8.05T5g00000gQ9znEAC.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping8.05T5g00000gQ9znEAC.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the right hand side of the page click the three dot button, and click "}, {"text": "Fetch Now", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping9.05T5g00000gQAEXEA4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupGoogleShopping9.05T5g00000gQAEXEA4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If your file exceeds 20 MB, it must be manually uploaded. Go to the Feed URL in your browser, download the file, then click the "}, {"text": "Manual Upload", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the Google Merchant Center."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children":
